title: 後日譚①　～ライブの後には……～

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Spe? You haven't changed your clothes yet. Did the zipper get stuck?
Should I fix it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry! Nothing's wrong with it! I'm just feeling kinda... starstruck, I
guess.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to explain, but everything I saw from up onstage—it was
amazing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I'd like to see it with you again someday.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! Me too! Let's do it again, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Come on, come on! Quit slacking off, you two! We gotta get ready to
m-o-v-e move!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You don't want the after-party to start without us, do you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! Talk about a luxurious feast! This is way more than I expected!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dunno if you've noticed, Spe, but this kind of party's called an after-party because with this amount of food, your tummy will be hanging low long after the party!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... I'm just astonished by what comes out of your mouth
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Is that a compliment from the one and only, the most venerable
McQueen? I am most honorably honored. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That wasn't a compliment in the slightest!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Guess I'm in charge of taking all McQueen's extra sweets to
help her not overeat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't need any such kind of help! I'll show you, this is self-restraint
befitting the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Maybe we should start getting food. Yeah, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Scarlet? You not gettin' anythin'?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Mmph... I'll get some later... I just need some time...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, c'mon... Sheesh, the so-called honor student's really wiped
herself out, huh? ...Wait here, I'll go grab us somethin'!
